---
title: "A | Live Ordinal SEM"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}


```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")
 

View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "❌ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
 
# Dichotomisierung der 9 HS-Items am Median  
hs <- HolzingerSwineford1939
items <- paste0("x", 1:9)
hs_d <- as.data.frame(lapply(
  hs[, items],
  function(v) as.integer(v > median(v))))
names(hs_d) <- paste0(items, "d")

model_3f <- '
  visual  =~ x1d + x2d + x3d
  textual =~ x4d + x5d + x6d
  speed   =~ x7d + x8d + x9d
' 
fit_cat <- cfa(
  model_3f,
  data = hs_d,
  ordered = paste0("x", 1:9, "d"))
```

## Live-Beispiel: Holzinger-Swineford dichotomisiert

<details open>
<summary>Daten</summary>

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
View(HolzingerSwineford1939)
```

</details>

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
library(lavaan) 
data(HolzingerSwineford1939)

# Dichotomisierung der 9 HS-Items am Median  
hs <- HolzingerSwineford1939
items <- paste0("x", 1:9)
hs_d <- as.data.frame(lapply(
  hs[, items],
  function(v) as.integer(v > median(v))))
names(hs_d) <- paste0(items, "d")

# Stichprobe der ersten 6 Zeilen
head(hs_d)
```

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
View(hs_d)
```

###  Verteilung der dichotomen Items
 
```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
# sapply(hs_d, mean) identisch zu:
colMeans(hs_d)
```

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
model_3f <- '
  visual  =~ x1d + x2d + x3d
  textual =~ x4d + x5d + x6d
  speed   =~ x7d + x8d + x9d
' 
fit_cat <- cfa(
  model_3f,
  data = hs_d,
  ordered = paste0("x", 1:9, "d"))

summary(fit_cat, standardized=T)
```

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
#| autorun: false
fitMeasures(fit_cat)
```


```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(lavaanPlot)
lavaanPlot(model = fit_cat,   
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE)
```
